name: AR Measurement & Ruler
promptBlock: AR ruler / measurement apps: For any AR measurement or ruler app, use the standard UX pattern: (1) tap to place first anchor point, (2) tap again to place second anchor point, (3) draw a visible line between the two points, (4) show distance in both inches and centimeters, (5) include a Reset button to start over. Tapping should lock the cursor dot's current AR raycast position as the anchor point — not place a point at the screen touch coordinates. The cursor dot tracks the AR surface continuously; tap confirms its current position.
